intent: Write a workflow that asks a local model to say hello in French.
Read the file notes.txt and produce a 3-bullet summary of it.
Classify a support message into bug, feature-request or question, extracting the product name and an urgency level, as validated structured output.
Fetch three given URLs, then write one merged brief of what they say.
Call a flaky JSON API and retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff before extracting the price field.
Translate a product description into 5 locales in parallel and gather the results into one file per locale.
Run the test suite; only if it passes, ask a human to confirm, then deploy with ./deploy.sh and notify a Slack webhook either way.
Given a git diff, fan out three reviewers (security, performance, style) in parallel and merge their findings into one ranked review.
Research a question with an agent allowed to fetch pages and read files, capped at 6 turns, then produce a sourced brief.
Pull rows from a CSV, enrich each with a model call, write failures to a side file, and make the run resumable.
